## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  Use object spread
with [flatWhiteCoffee](../variables/flatWhiteCoffee.md) directly:
`{ ...flatWhiteCoffee, name: "Custom" }`.

## Remarks

Uses [flatWhiteCoffee](../variables/flatWhiteCoffee.md) as the base and merges the provided
overrides via object spread.
